source.query:
select 'select '''||trim(r.RDB$RELATION_NAME)||''', count(*) from "'||trim(r.RDB$RELATION_NAME)||'" union '
from RDB$RELATIONS r
where (r.RDB$SYSTEM_FLAG is null or r.RDB$SYSTEM_FLAG = 0)
and r.RDB$VIEW_BLR is null
order by 1
